case_title: 2050 VAN NESS AVENUE, LLC VS. WILMAN RECINOS ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 2050 VAN NESS AVENUE, LLC

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT [CCP SEC 664.6] AND ALTERNATIVELY FOR AN ORDER SHORTENING TIME FOR A NOTICED MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF 2050 VAN NESS AVENUE, LLC
ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $240.00 PER DAY (DAILY RENTAL VALUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF 2050 VAN NESS AVENUE, LLC
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 2050 VAN NESS AVENUE, LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT RECINOS, WILMAN RECINOS, CHRISTINE
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS SF AUTO BODY, LLC PACIFIC HEIGHTS AUTO BODY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 2050 VAN NESS AVENUE, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT RECINOS, WILMAN RECINOS, CHRISTINE WELLS SF AUTO BODY, LLC PACIFIC HEIGHTS AUTO BODY DOES 1-5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 2050 VAN NESS AVENUE, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RECINOS, WILMAN RECINOS, CHRISTINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1675 PACIFIC AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109 $43,900.00 RENT, $1,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $45,400.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RECINOS, WILMAN RECINOS, CHRISTINE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT RECINOS, WILMAN RECINOS, CHRISTINE
